Title: CellValue ReturnType
Description: The Density value is constant inside each cell and is sampled from the provided Densty field.

Options.Label: DefaultValue
Options.Description: This value is used outside of cells. This can happen when the field’s MaxDistance value is smaller than the distance between some Positions.

Outputs.Label: Density
Outputs.Description: The Density value of each cell is sampled from this field at the cell’s core Position point.
